case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF VS. GUNTHER W DE LA ROCHE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
